---
title: "Martha"
---

## Martha

### Description

working in Misselbrook\'s shop (15 March 1852).

### Biography

She may be the Martha (Andrews) Collins who was the village postmistress.  Perhaps she had been a servant at Otterbourne House before marrying.

### Letters

- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
